chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1180 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 22.09.2022 Mr. Abid Ali Thebo advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- It is stated that in the Government Primary School Ibrahim Chandio although teachers are posted but they are not performing their duties and are getting salaries. We refer the cases of teachers posted in said School to the District Education Officer (Primary) Dadu to take stern action against them for remaining absent, if it is the case and submit compliance report for a perusal in the Chamber. The petition in the terms as stated above is disposed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
